notes: Hand-curated classic dishes used to suggest 'what could I make' from the user's ingredient selection. Descriptions are brief and factual; instructions are intentionally omitted (find a real recipe for those).

recipes.name: Caprese Salad
recipes.about: Italian sliced tomato, fresh mozzarella, and basil dressed with olive oil.

recipes.name: Tomato Basil Pasta
recipes.about: Pasta with a quick tomato-garlic-basil sauce, finished with parmesan.

recipes.name: Pesto Pasta
recipes.about: Pasta tossed with basil pesto: pine nuts, parmesan, garlic, and olive oil.

recipes.name: Aglio e Olio
recipes.about: Spaghetti with garlic, olive oil, chili flakes, and parsley.

recipes.name: Bruschetta
recipes.about: Toasted bread topped with tomato, basil, garlic, and olive oil.

recipes.name: Mushroom Risotto
recipes.about: Creamy Italian rice with sautéed mushrooms, parmesan, and thyme.

recipes.name: Brown-Butter Sage Squash Pasta
recipes.about: Pasta with roasted butternut squash, brown butter, sage, and parmesan.

recipes.name: Mac and Cheese
recipes.about: Pasta in a cheddar cheese sauce, baked or stovetop.

recipes.name: Roasted Chicken
recipes.about: Whole chicken roasted with lemon, herbs, and garlic.

recipes.name: Chicken Piccata
recipes.about: Chicken cutlets in a lemon-caper-butter sauce with parsley.

recipes.name: Coq au Vin
recipes.about: Chicken braised in red wine with mushrooms, bacon, onions, and thyme.

recipes.name: Shrimp Scampi
recipes.about: Shrimp sautéed in garlic butter with lemon, parsley, and a pinch of chili.

recipes.name: Pork Chops with Apples
recipes.about: Seared pork chops with apples cooked in butter and sage.

recipes.name: Maple-Mustard Pork Tenderloin
recipes.about: Pork tenderloin glazed with maple syrup and mustard, roasted with garlic and thyme.

recipes.name: Beef Stew
recipes.about: Beef simmered with onions, carrots, red wine, and herbs until tender.

recipes.name: Rosemary Garlic Lamb
recipes.about: Lamb roasted with rosemary, garlic, olive oil, and lemon.

recipes.name: Lamb with Yogurt and Mint
recipes.about: Spiced lamb served with a cool yogurt-mint sauce.

recipes.name: Duck à l'Orange
recipes.about: Roast duck with a sweet-tart orange sauce, finished with thyme.

recipes.name: Cobb Salad

recipes.name: Greek Salad
recipes.about: Tomatoes, cucumbers, feta, olives, and red onion with oregano and olive oil.

recipes.name: Pear Blue Cheese Salad
